theme: Do you think voting should be mandatory for all ci

sentences.english: Do you think voting should be mandatory for all citizens?
sentences.korean: 투표가 모든 시민에게 의무여야 한다고 생각합니까?

sentences.english: I believe making voting mandatory would strengthen democracy.
sentences.korean: 투표를 의무화하면 민주주의를 강화할 거라고 생각해요.

sentences.english: When only a small percentage of citizens vote election results don't truly represent the will of the people.
sentences.korean: 소수의 시민만 투표하면 선거 결과가 국민의 의사를 진정으로 대표하지 못해요.

sentences.english: Countries like Australia which have mandatory voting consistently see participation rates above ninety percent.
sentences.korean: 의무 투표제인 호주 같은 나라는 꾸준히 90% 이상의 참여율을 기록해요.

sentences.english: Some argue that forcing people to vote violates their freedom but I think participating in democracy is a civic responsibility not just a right.
sentences.korean: 투표를 강제하면 자유를 침해한다는 주장이 있지만 민주주의 참여는 권리만이 아닌 시민적 책임이라 생각해요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Longer Vacations vs. Shorter Frequent Breaks
Do you think a university degree is still necessar
Do you think voting should be mandatory for all ci
